title: Birthday Party
scene: 你参加朋友的生日派对。

turns.cn: 来了！谢谢来庆祝！
turns.en: You made it! Thanks for coming!

turns.cn: 生日快乐！这是给你的礼物。
turns.en: Happy birthday! Here's your gift.

turns.cn: 你太客气了，随便坐，有吃的在那边。
turns.en: You're too kind. Make yourself at home. Food's over there.

turns.cn: 需要我帮忙吗？
turns.en: Do you need any help?

turns.cn: 不用，一会儿切蛋糕，大概八点。
turns.en: We're good. Cake's around eight.

turns.cn: 好的，人来得真不少！
turns.en: Sounds great. Quite a crowd!

turns.cn: 是啊，很高兴你能来。
turns.en: Yeah. So glad you could make it.

title: BBQ at Home
scene: 你在朋友家后院烧烤聚会。

turns.cn: 肉还要烤十分钟，先喝点？
turns.en: Meat needs ten more minutes. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 来杯啤酒，谢谢。需要我翻肉吗？
turns.en: A beer, please. Need me to flip anything?

turns.cn: 帮我把那盘香肠拿过来就行。
turns.en: Just grab that tray of sausages.

turns.cn: 你腌的酱真香！
turns.en: Your marinade smells amazing!

turns.cn: 秘方，下次教你。
turns.en: Secret recipe. I'll teach you sometime.

turns.cn: 好，我带点甜点下次带过来。
turns.en: Deal. I'll bring dessert next time.

turns.cn: 完美！
turns.en: Perfect!

title: Wedding Invitation
scene: 朋友邀请你参加婚礼，你确认出席。

turns.cn: 我们要结婚了！六月十五号，你能来吗？
turns.en: We're getting married! June fifteenth. Can you come?

turns.cn: 恭喜！我一定到，需要带伴吗？
turns.en: Congratulations! I'll be there. Do I need a plus-one?

turns.cn: 可以带一位，请月底前回复。
turns.en: One guest is fine. Please RSVP by the end of the month.

turns.cn: 礼服有要求吗？
turns.en: Is there a dress code?

turns.cn: 半正式，户外仪式，穿舒服的鞋。
turns.en: Semi-formal. It's outdoors, so comfortable shoes.

turns.cn: 礼物有登记清单吗？
turns.en: Do you have a gift registry?

turns.cn: 网站链接在请柬里，人来就是最好的礼物。
turns.en: Link's on the invite, but your presence means the most.

title: Declining an Invitation
scene: 朋友邀请你周末聚会，你有事去不了。

turns.cn: 周六来我家聚餐吧？
turns.en: Want to come over for dinner Saturday?

turns.cn: 谢谢邀请，那天我要回老家。
turns.en: Thanks for asking. I'm heading to my hometown that day.

turns.cn: 没事，下次再约。
turns.en: No worries. Let's plan another time.

turns.cn: 下周怎么样？我请你吃饭。
turns.en: How about next week? Dinner's on me.

turns.cn: 周三晚上可以。
turns.en: Wednesday evening works.

turns.cn: 好，我订位子发你。
turns.en: Great. I'll book a table and text you.

turns.cn: 期待！
turns.en: Looking forward to it!

title: Meeting Someone New
scene: 朋友在聚会上介绍你认识新朋友。

turns.cn: 嗨，听说你也是做软件的？
turns.en: Hi, I heard you work in software too?

turns.cn: 对，前端开发，你呢？
turns.en: Yeah, front-end. How about you?

turns.cn: 我在初创公司做产品。
turns.en: I'm in product at a startup.

turns.cn: 挺忙的最近吧？行业都这样。
turns.en: Busy lately, I bet? Everyone seems slammed.

turns.cn: 是啊，不过挺有成就感。住这附近吗？
turns.en: Yeah, but it's rewarding. Do you live around here?

turns.cn: 三个街区，常来这家酒吧。
turns.en: Three blocks away. I come to this bar a lot.

turns.cn: 那改天一起喝一杯！
turns.en: Let's grab a drink sometime!
